scenarios.title: Single-Cell Omics and Scanpy Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: AnnData setup, annotated matrix construction, H5AD/Zarr storage, Scanpy-adjacent data containers, lazy/backed reads, AnnData concatenation, accessors, and extension namespaces.
scenarios.role: Provides package-specific AnnData guidance for object modeling, storage I/O, data combination, reference accessors, and extension namespaces.
scenarios.read_when: Use when the task involves annotated matrix containers, AnnData, H5AD/Zarr storage, backed or lazy reads, concatenation, AnnCollection, aligned obs/var/layers/obsm/varm/obsp/varp data, raw snapshots, anndata.acc references, or extension namespaces.
scenarios.best_for: Building and validating AnnData objects, reading/writing H5AD or Zarr, choosing backed/lazy access, combining batches, troubleshooting aligned annotations, and designing AnnData-aware library helpers.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is primarily Scanpy preprocessing/plotting, scvi-tools modeling, MuData multimodal workflows, or bulk RNA-seq differential expression without direct AnnData API questions.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `anndata` for annotated matrix container semantics, H5AD/Zarr storage, backed/lazy access, concatenation, aligned annotation troubleshooting, and AnnData extension mechanics. Pair it with Scanpy or scvi-tools when the user asks for analysis or modeling workflows built on top of AnnData.
